results.title: Banda hottest in country again, IMD puts Uttar Pradesh on ‘red alert’ for next 3 days
results.description: UP heatwave intensifies as IMD issues red alert across Uttar Pradesh amid soaring temperatures and severe hot weather conditions this week.

results.title: Odisha Works Minister Puts Key Projects on Fast Track, Cracks Whip on Quality & Timelines
results.description: In a no-nonsense review meeting that sent a clear message across the state’s construction sector, Works Minister Prithviraj Harichandan today put projects worth over Rs 50 crore under the microscope. With quality, speed, and zero tolerance for negligence as his mantra, the minister warned that any slip-ups — by officials or contractors — will invite [...] The post Odisha Works Minister Puts Key Projects on Fast Track, Cracks Whip on Quality & Timelines appeared first on Pragativadi I Latest Odisha News in English I Breaking News .

results.title: Won't stop until Dharmendra Pradhan resigns, says Rahul Gandhi, targets PM Modi for 'making reels' in Italy
results.description: In a post on X, he said the Congress will not stop till Pradhan resigns and a robust system to prevent paper leaks is put in place.

results.title: UP Heatwave: Banda Sizzles at 48.2°C
results.description: ఉత్తర భారతంలో భానుడు కరాల నృత్యం చేస్తున్నాడు. ముఖ్యంగా ఉత్తరప్రదేశ్ రాష్ట్రంలోని బాందా జిల్లా వరుసగా మూడో రోజు కూడా దేశంలోనే అత్యధిక ఉష్ణోగ్రత నమోదైన ప్రాంతంగా నిలిచింది.

results.title: DRI Busts Illegal Wildlife Trade Racket In Pune, Rescues Rare Protected Species
results.description: DRI Mumbai Zonal Unit officers intercepted two suspects in Pune on Wednesday over alleged illegal possession and attempted sale of protected wildlife. Acting on specific intelligence, officials recovered three live Malabar giant squirrels hidden in cartons from one suspect and seven live Indian star tortoises from another location, later handing them to the Forest Department for legal action.
